_comment: 22个工具的 OpenAI-style function 定义,提取自 MyDataFiles/01_工具Schema.md。会话 scope=GameRuntime,因此全部17个UGC工具可见+5个内置工具。供 /api/chat 的 tools 字段使用。

function.name: unreal_info
function.description: Return engine/project/platform environment info. Use when the user asks about current engine version/project/platform/editor mode.

function.name: list_skills
function.description: List runtime-available skills. Refresh/verify the skill catalog.

function.name: load_skill
function.description: Load the full instructions of a named skill into context.

name.description: The exact skill name. Must match one of the names returned by list_skills.

function.name: task
function.description: Launch a new subagent session to handle a complex, multi-step task. Use when the task warrants its own isolated context and tool scope. The subagent runs with its own system prompt and tool policy, and returns a single textual summary back to you.

description.description: A short (3-5 word) description of the task. Shown in the UI only.

prompt.description: The exact task for the subagent. Must be fully self-contained because the subagent starts without any of your conversation history.

subagent_type.description: Which subagent to launch. Must match a registered subagent name.

function.name: ask_user
function.description: Ask the user one necessary clarifying question before continuing. Use ONLY when a missing required decision or high-risk ambiguity affects correctness AND cannot be resolved with available tools. Do NOT use for optional preferences, greetings, or task summaries.

question.description: A clear, necessary, answerable question to ask the user before continuing.

options.description: Optional quick replies. The user may still provide a custom answer.

function.name: ugc_get_item_catalog
function.description: Return the runtime UGC item catalog. With 'name', performs semantic Top-N retrieval (falls back to fuzzy name match if semantic is unavailable). Use to find a valid item_table_id by description.

name.description: ASCII English-only name or NL query for semantic/fuzzy search.

limit.description: Required when 'name' is provided (used as semantic TopK).

function.name: ugc_get_scene_summary
function.description: Summarize the current UGC runtime scene: entity counts per item type + home bounds.

function.name: ugc_query_entities_by_type
function.description: Query placed entities in the active world by item_table_id. Primary path to obtain unique_id of placed instances.

function.name: ugc_query_entities_by_area
function.description: Spherical spatial query sorted by distance. level=entity uses pivot+euclidean; level=building uses CPG bounds+SVO path.

function.name: ugc_get_entity_detail
function.description: Return detailed runtime info of a single entity by unique_id, including carrying surfaces. Prerequisite for placing onto a specific surface.

unique_id.description: Unique instance id of a placed entity.

function.name: ugc_get_house_info
function.description: Return the full entity composition tree of all buildings (structure + furniture). No parameters.

function.name: ugc_get_indoor_info
function.description: Classify all HouseGround floors as indoor/outdoor. Classification only, not an availability filter. No parameters.

function.name: ugc_query_paint_surfaces
function.description: Query an entity's paintable surfaces and their current paint state by unique_id.

function.name: ugc_query_paint_brushes
function.description: Query global texture brushes + color-brush schema. Does NOT need unique_id.

function.name: ugc_get_player_context
function.description: Get current runtime player world location and facing. Use nearby_center as the center point for vague spatial needs like 'nearby' / 'in front of me'.

function.name: ugc_analyze_scene_capture
function.description: Capture the current player camera view and attach it to the AI session for visual analysis. Use when the user asks about scene/building style/layout/color/material/visible objects.

prompt.description: The visual question, ideally the user's own words.

function.name: ugc_create_entity
function.description: Atomically create an entity at world coordinates by item_table_id+location(+rotation). ONLY when the final world coordinate is already determined. Does NOT auto-find surfaces / snap to ground / collision pre-check. To place onto an existing surface you MUST use ugc_place_on_surface instead.

function.name: ugc_place_on_surface
function.description: Place item(s) onto an existing entity's carrying surface (floor/table/shelf/platform/wall). MUST be preferred when placing onto an existing surface. Requires querying the target_entity_id first. Internally does collision detection + auto-relocation.

function.name: ugc_delete_entity
function.description: Delete a single UGC entity by unique_id. Requires querying the unique_id first.

function.name: ugc_move_entity
function.description: Move or rotate a single entity by unique_id. Only changes provided fields. At least one of new_location/new_rotation must be provided.

function.name: ugc_paint_texture_surface
function.description: Apply a texture brush to a named paint surface by unique_id. Recommend querying paint surfaces + brushes first.

function.name: ugc_paint_color_surface
function.description: Apply color params to a named paint surface by unique_id. Colors must be #RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA.
